newsitems.title: 👿 3 days until release!
newsitems.author: 我于世界是熟睡丈夫
newsitems.contents: 🚫 Trapped by a Yandere Girl c⌒っﾟДﾟ)っThe cute yet twisted visual novel *The Seven Days I spent with You* is set to launch on Steam on Wednesday, June 17! The game supports Simplified Chinese and English, has a playtime of approximately 4 hours.——————————————📢 Notice Regarding the Removal of the Demo VersionSince there are some differences between the full version and the demo version, we will remove the demo version when the full version is released to ensure a consistent gaming experience for all players.Thank you for your feedback and for trying out the demo version. We invite you to experience the full game in the official release!

newsitems.title: 📅 6 days until release!
newsitems.author: 我于世界是熟睡丈夫
newsitems.contents: “A world with just the two of us—wouldn’t that be blissful for you?”😈 Yandere × Confinement 🚫 The dating sim *The Seven Days I spent with You* will officially launch on Steam on Wednesday, June 17!📅 The release date, originally set for June 18, has been moved up to June 17.The game supports Simplified Chinese and English, has a playtime of approximately 4 hours. It’s definitely worth looking forward to!

newsitems.title: “The seven days I spent with you” to be released on June 18 !
newsitems.author: 我于世界是熟睡丈夫
newsitems.contents: “The seven days I spent with You,” a short anime-style GAL game featuring a yandere heroine and 2D characters, has successfully passed the review process and will be officially released on Steam on June 18. The final price of the game is currently being finalized and will be announced shortly.Over the past few months, the development team has been working to further refine and expand the game's content. In addition to improvements to the UI and overall performance, we have reorganized and expanded the story, adding a new second-playthrough scenario, new CG scenes, and original special illustrations. The total playtime is approximately 4–5 hours.We hope to deliver this story—centered on memory, lies, and obsession—to you in its most complete form.Please add “The seven days I spent with You” to your wishlist so you can enjoy it as soon as it launches.

newsitems.title: LSP Spring Joy Festival ✽2026 New Year Theme Event✽ is now live!
newsitems.author: YAMAYURI GAMES
newsitems.contents: 亲爱的各位玩家：2026农历新年就要到了！ 值此新春将至之际，愿各位在奔赴热爱的路上稍作停歇，与重要之人共度一个温暖而圆满的春节。新春假期期间，我们举办了“LSP春快乐节”活动，期待您的参加！◇ 🏷️史低初卖 ◆2月13-25日，LSP恋爱游戏在Steam平台的新春史低特卖正式开启！多款热门作品限时特惠低至三折。《我的高冷女友》、《男娘恋爱物语》首次推出-20%新历史低价折扣，期待您的惠顾。更多优惠，请前往活动特设页面查看：https://store.steampowered.com/developer/LSPGAL/list/166381◆ 🐎岁首初报 ◇信使拍马而至，让我们一同看看LSP恋爱游戏的新年动向——LSP主站会员折扣CDKEY商店公测开启，全新积分系统上线 >>逛逛商店《我的高冷女友》社区物品上架《终有一日愿遂思恋》等DEMO更新、发布 无字漫画小剧场《三色绘恋TSF ~我变成她的那一天~》震撼发布！>>前往查看 《世纪末之诗》众筹项目，40万里程碑达成 >>前往查看更多好消息，正在陆续赶来。关注企划，即可订阅看板娘推荐的游戏资讯，最新情报一网打尽。◇ 🕹️喜初加一 ◆权益系统升级后，LSP+1首次为您带来CDKEY喜加一活动！本次我们补充了比往次更多的500+个激活码，领取门槛也下调到了Lv1级，快快登录主站兑换领取资格吧！◆ 🧧福袋抽选 ◇LSP乐透推出了新春SP活动，为大家送出5份看板娘的新春福袋。福袋内容包括：⋄ 看板娘活动主题大色纸 ⋄ 价值10-100元的随机面值Steam充值卡 ⋄ 价值100-500元的随机游戏周边 一共5个名额，期待您的参加！❙ 参加抽奖：https://www.lspsp.me/shop最后，祝福大家2026如最自由的骏马一般一路奔赴热爱，所到之处皆为美好。新年快乐！

newsitems.title: Happy New Year 2026!
newsitems.author: YAMAYURI GAMES
newsitems.contents: ✦ ✿𝆬 ♥The wind turns the pages, and 2026 has arrived!Between the lines, stars, flowers, and love gently drift in. Looking back on the past year, there are stories yet to be fully told, and miracles still being born. LoveStoryProject sincerely thanks every one of you who has walked alongside us to this moment. In the new year, we will continue to explore passion with our original aspiration, and respond to expectations with heartfelt dedication, together with a renewed you, witnessing the unfolding of every moving story. Wishing you a Happy New Year 2026!May resonance and heartfelt emotion always be with you. 2025 RecapGames we released over the past year2026 OutlookGames scheduled for release in the coming year【New Year releases perfect for the holiday season】【New titles expected to launch in Q1 2026】【Upcoming titles awaiting release date announcements】
